validation.notes: Lean infrastructure feature; roadmap authored by orchestrator from DESIGN ADR-001 + DISTILL scaffolds. Automated quality gate passed.

phases.name: Unify and cover vim_commit
phases.description: Remove dual compilation, then activate the DISTILL error-branch scaffolds to clear the 95% gate.

steps.name: Unify binary onto library crate
criteria: main.rs imports vim_commit and config from the rusty_commit_saver crate, not via pub mod
vim_commit.rs and config.rs compile exactly once (no dead duplicate)
the 9 PASS-on-activation DISTILL tests are un-ignored and green
full suite green in parallel; clippy clean; release build green
steps.implementation_notes: Replace `pub mod vim_commit;`/`pub mod config;` in main.rs with `use rusty_commit_saver::vim_commit::{...}` and `use rusty_commit_saver::config::GlobalVars;`. run_commit_saver + main_tests STAY in main.rs (codecov ignores main.rs); they still cover the single lib copy. DEVIATION from DESIGN ADR-001 mechanic #3: run_commit_saver was never in lib.rs, so it is NOT moved (unnecessary for the goal). Remove #[ignore] from the 9 PASS-on-activation tests.

steps.name: Add path-injection helper and finish coverage
criteria: try_discover(path) helper added; try_new delegates to it
blocked discover-failure test activated via try_discover on a non-repo tempdir
timestamp arm covered, or left ignored with a documented-unreachable comment
vim_commit.rs line coverage >= 95% via devenv test-coverage
steps.implementation_notes: Add `pub fn try_discover(path: &Path) -> Result<Self, Box<dyn Error>>` = Repository::discover(path) then from_repo; refactor try_new to call try_discover("./"). Activate test_try_new_discovery_failure_blocked using try_discover on a tempdir that is not inside a repo. Investigate the out-of-range-timestamp arm per distill/upstream-issues.md; if uncoverable leave #[ignore] + the documented comment (one uncovered defensive line is acceptable within >=95%).
